hooks.command: f=~/.claude/memory/MEMORY.md; cap=50; if [ -f "$f" ]; then total=$(wc -l < "$f"); if [ "$total" -gt "$cap" ]; then head -n "$cap" "$f"; echo; echo "... (truncated: $((total-cap)) more lines in ~/.claude/memory/MEMORY.md -- run a compaction pass, see ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md)"; else cat "$f"; fi; fi; true
input=$(cat); case "$input" in *memory*.md*) printf "%s" "$input" | node ~/.claude/scripts/memory-lint.js 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true
